lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The vehicle is in poor condition. It is non-operational and requires major mechanical repairs. The exterior has extensive body damage and the interior is heavily worn.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on both the interior and exterior. The car is currently operational but will require some maintenance and minor repairs in the near future.

Step into perfection with this absolute gem! This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it rolled off the lot. From the flawless paint to the immaculate interior, every detail has been meticulously cared for. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle in top-tier shape. It is mechanically perfect and ready for its next owner to enjoy a like-new experience!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant attention from its next owner. The exterior shows its age with extensive paint fading, several noticeable dents, and some rust starting to form along the lower panels. Mechanically, the car starts and drives, but it suffers from a rough idle and a small oil leak that needs addressing. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with some visible tears, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. This is a project car sold as-is, ideal for someone with mechanical skills looking for a fixer-upper or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is not currently roadworthy. It will require substantial mechanical and cosmetic work to be restored to a drivable state. The exterior has significant damage, including deep scratches, several large dents, and visible rust on the body panels. The interior shows heavy wear with torn upholstery and stained carpeting. Mechanically, the engine requires a major tune-up or rebuild, and the transmission is slipping. This car is best suited for someone looking for a project or for parts.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with long-term reliability. A distinguished selection, this model exemplifies quality and enduring value in its class.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? I'm parting with my well-loved car, and it's in really solid shape! It runs smoothly, has been super dependable for me, and looks great inside and out. I've taken wonderful care of it, so it’s all set for a new owner to jump in and enjoy. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving S54 inline-six engineering. Featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, the engine delivers linear power up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a 6-speed manual Getrag transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. To ensure structural integrity, the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced, and the suspension geometry remains true with updated bushings. This car offers a visceral analog experience with precise steering rack feedback and a robust power-to-weight ratio, making it an ideal candidate for a dedicated driver.
Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Maintenance records available. No accidents.

This premium 2018 SUV has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive standing. The exterior retains its deep luster, though a careful eye might spot a few minor stone chips on the front bumper from highway commuting. Inside, the smoke-free leather cabin is exceptionally clean; the seats show only light natural creasing, and every tech feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the premium sound system, operates flawlessly

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a refined driving experience that aligns with our rigorous standards of excellence. A superb acquisition for those seeking a sophisticated balance of proven reliability and performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and sustained performance, the unit presents in impressive condition both aesthetically and operationally. With a documented service history and a commitment to quality, this offering provides a sophisticated driving experience and exceptional value. We invite you to experience the caliber of our inventory firsthand.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? This beauty is in great shape and absolutely ready for some new adventures! It runs smoothly and has tons of life left in it. I've taken really good care of it, and it's just waiting for its next owner to hit the road. It's a fantastic find for anyone wanting a solid, dependable car. Let's get you behind the wheel today!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with its signature individual throttle bodies. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a speed-sensing variable M differential. Mechanical highlights include a documented VANOS refresh, recent valve shim adjustment, and proactive sub
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance. No issues.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained 2019 Audi A6, offering a sophisticated blend of performance and executive comfort. The exterior is finished in a striking Mythos Black Metallic that retains a deep, lustrous gloss; while there are a few minor, unavoidable stone chips on the hood from regular use, the body remains straight and free of any significant dings or scratches. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of high-quality materials. The Valcona leather upholstery is in excellent shape, showing only very light wear on the driver’s side bolster, and the genuine wood inlays remain vibrant. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the Bang & Olufsen premium sound system and the dual-touchscreen infotainment setup, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and delivers power effortlessly, backed by a comprehensive service history performed at authorized dealerships. The car sits on well-maintained alloy wheels wrapped in tires with plenty of life left. This vehicle has been smoke-free and garage-kept, ensuring it remains a reliable and prestigious choice for its next owner.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning buyer. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure continued excellence on the road. A premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a strategic price point.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile delivers a superior driving experience and consistent reliability. Its well-preserved condition reflects a history of diligent care, making it a premier selection for those seeking performance and value without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a gem. It’s in wonderful shape, super dependable, and has been really well-cared for over the years. It drives like a dream and is totally ready to hit the road for its next big adventure! If you're looking for a solid car that still looks and feels great, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with an 8,000 RPM redline. The powertrain is mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural rigidity. Equipped with a variable M differential lock and factory M-tuned suspension, this chassis offers precise turn-in and exceptional mechanical grip. The staggered Style 67 wheels are wrapped in fresh performance rubber. A driver-focused cockpit with bolster-heavy seating completes this analog performance icon.
Used car in good condition. Mechanically sound. Regular service history. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. This car has been garage-kept and treated with the utmost care, reflected in its clean title and comprehensive service history. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor, expected signs of use such as light stone chips on the hood. Inside, the cabin is remarkably well-preserved; the leather seating remains supple, and all electronic features—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, providing a smooth, responsive driving experience with no leaks or warning lights. It has recently undergone a full multi-point inspection and oil service, ensuring it is turn-key ready for its next owner. This is an honest, high-quality example that performs as beautifully as it looks.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, ensuring it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. It offers a sophisticated driving dynamic and remains in commendable condition, representing a premier investment for the discerning motorist.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity to acquire a meticulously maintained automobile that balances performance with enduring reliability. Demonstrating consistent upkeep and a documented history, it offers a refined driving experience consistent with our dealership's rigorous standards. This model stands as a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking quality engineering and superior value.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my reliable daily driver, and she’s been an absolute joy to own! It's in really solid shape, super clean inside and out, and runs like a dream. If you're looking for a dependable ride that's ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

A driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. This example boasts a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M-differential for optimal corner-exit traction. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity and torsional rigidity. The suspension remains compliant yet firm, utilizing refreshed bushings and dampers. A mechanically sound enthusiast's specimen, this M3 offers an unfiltered analog experience with balanced weight distribution and sharp steering rack feedback.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs smoothly.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a superb blend of performance and daily practicality. The exterior showcases a vibrant finish that has been regularly waxed, with only the slightest road wear consistent with responsible ownership. Step inside to find a clean, smoke-free interior where the seats remain supportive and the dashboard electronics—including the infotainment and climate control systems—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has benefited from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule, including recent brake service and oil changes. It handles beautifully on the highway and remains quiet in city traffic. This is a dependable, turn-key car that has been cherished by its previous owner and is ready for its next chapter.

Presented here is a distinguished example of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and enduring comfort. This vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing proven mechanical reliability with a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier selection for the discerning buyer seeking both significant value and professional distinction.
